Dashboard placeholder

This file ships with the source tree so the Go server can //go:embed dashboard/dist even before the React app is built. If you're seeing this in a browser, the dashboard hasn't been compiled into this server binary.

To replace it with the real dashboard, run:

cd dashboard && pnpm install && pnpm build

or from the repo root:

task build:dashboard

Production Docker images do this automatically — see deploy/docker/Dockerfile.server.
